expectations.text: Identifies LFPBandV1 (or upstream LFP) as needing a new selection only if the new electrodes weren't already in the group
expectations.evidence: Case A 'unaffected: LFPBandV1' if already band-filtered; Case B 'LFPBandV1 — re-populates for the new selection' if not.

expectations.text: Identifies RippleTimesV1 as the table that re-populates
expectations.evidence: 'RippleTimesV1 — re-populates. This is the table that actually recomputes the ripple times'.

expectations.text: States that RippleParameters is UNAFFECTED because it is a parameter Lookup table, not electrode-dependent
expectations.evidence: 'RippleParameters — this is a dj.Lookup table holding parameter names ... It has no electrode dependency'.

expectations.text: Notes unrelated branches (decoding, position) are unaffected unless they consume the same ripple times
expectations.evidence: 'Position pipelines ... don't depend on the electrode selection ... Decoding pipelines ... unaffected unless your downstream analysis explicitly restricts decoded posteriors to ripple times'.
